pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Although Leadership & Strategy is an edge domain for the Director of Master Data Management, this skill KSA presents sufficient signal (composite score 0.529) and conceptual alignment to include at the director level.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Leadership & Strategy), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.529). External reviewers may question whether this specific skill KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the Director of Master Data Management versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: McKinsey, Gartner, and Harvard Business Review consistently identify leadership and strategy skills as core differentiators for C-suite and VP data leaders.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with Leadership & Strategy appearing in job postings and role definition literature for Director of Master Data Management.

decision_rationale: Edge-domain Leadership & Strategy skill KSA cleared adversarial review with score 0.529. Included based on sufficient framework alignment and role relevance for the Director of Master Data Management.
